title: Technical Business Support Engineer
description:
Morgan McKinley is hiring for a Technical Business Support Engineer for a 12-month contract assignment.

Job Responsibilities: 

  • Monitor and prioritize daily customer support tickets, handling triage and escalation as needed.
  • Respond to alerts indicating out-of-trend metrics, coordinating action with relevant stakeholders.
  • Provide daily business summaries for hand-over between regions and review inbound emergency escalations.
  • Identify recurring issues and develop runbooks or guides to facilitate resolution.
  • Build dashboards to track support health metrics and proactively communicate customer issues across teams.

Requirements:

  • BA/BSc degree in a computer-related field with over 4 years of experience in technical support, site reliability engineering, or similar roles.
  • At least 2 years of project experience, effective in communication across all organizational levels, both internally and externally.
  • Proficient in at least one programming language such as Python, Shell, or Java, with strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Experienced working with multicultural, multilingual global teams, developing business operations from scratch, and engaging with cross-functional partners.
  • Skilled in working independently, prioritizing tasks with minimal supervision, and collaborating effectively with international teams and external stakeholders.
  • Additional experience with full web stack development, REST APIs, SQL, managing customer relationships, and implementing process improvements in fast-paced environment

If you are keen on this exciting opportunity, kindly ‘Apply Now’.

*Referrals are greatly appreciated*

By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to Morgan Mckinley Pte Ltd and its affiliates to collect, use and disclose your personal data for the purposes set out in the Privacy Policy available at https://www.morganmckinley.com/sg/privacy-policy. You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

Morgan McKinley Pte Ltd

Ramitha Ravindran

postedCompany.description:
As a global professional services recruitment consultancy, Morgan McKinley connects specialist talent with leading employers across multiple industries and disciplines.


Our promise to you

You can get the best advice for your career at Morgan McKinley. Our team of consultants have either have an educational background in their sector or have industry experience. We take the time to listen to your long term goals and provide you with honest feedback to help you realise them.

Over the years many people have progressed their careers with us both here in Singapore and internationally and our global presence gives us insight into the domestic and international  markets. In Singapore we specialise in Banking & Financial Services, Legal, Compliance & Audit, Finance & Accounting, IT, Project Management, Sales & Marketing, HR and Supply Chain & Procurement.
